purpose: Scan open conflicting PRs and dispatch resolve comments.

capability.description: Runtime capability slug whose sidecar state is loaded and updated.

permissions.name: gh
permissions.usage: Reads PRs and posts resolve or stuck comments.

permissions.name: jq
permissions.usage: Filters PR JSON and builds next-state JSON.

success: auto-resolve completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: auto-resolve cannot return a valid canonical result
